  average_transaction_value decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average transaction value for sales originating from this zone, used for zone performance analysis.']
  capacity_units varchar [note: 'Maximum number of product units that can be displayed or stored in this zone.']
  climate_controlled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the zone has dedicated climate control for temperature-sensitive merchandise.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this zone record was first created in the system.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the zone including its purpose, merchandise focus, and operational notes.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this zone configuration was deactivated or replaced. Null for currently active zones.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when this zone configuration became active in the store.']
  fixture_count varchar [note: 'Number of display fixtures, racks, or shelving units allocated to this zone.']
  floor_level varchar [note: 'Floor number where the zone is located (e.g., 1 for ground floor, 2 for second floor, -1 for basement).']
  last_merchandising_reset_date date [note: 'Date when the zone last underwent a full merchandising reset or planogram change.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this zone record was last modified in the system.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional operational notes or special instructions related to the zone management.']
  omnichannel_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the zone supports omnichannel fulfillment operations such as Buy Online Pickup In Store (BOPIS) or ship-from-store.']
  security_level varchar [note: 'Security monitoring level assigned to the zone based on merchandise value and shrinkage risk.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the zone within the store.']
  target_sales_per_square_meter decimal(12,2) [note: 'Target sales productivity metric for this zone measured as revenue per square meter.']
  traffic_priority varchar [note: 'Customer traffic priority classification for this zone based on store layout and flow analysis.']
  visual_merchandising_theme varchar [note: 'Current visual merchandising theme or campaign applied to the zone (e.g., Spring Collection, Holiday, Back to School).']
  zone_category varchar [note: 'Merchandise category or department assigned to this zone.']
  zone_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the zone used in store operations and reporting.']
  zone_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the zone (e.g., Mens Apparel, Footwear, Accessories, Checkout).']
  zone_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the zone by its primary function within the store.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for zone. Referenced by zone_id.'
}

Table store.district {
  district_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for district']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the employee who serves as the district manager responsible for all stores within this district.']
  parent_district_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on district (parent_district_id)']
  region_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent region that this district belongs to in the organizational hierarchy.']
  annual_sales_target decimal(15,2) [note: 'Planned annual sales revenue target for the district, used for performance measurement and incentive calculations.']
  annual_traffic_target varchar [note: 'Planned annual customer traffic target across all stores in the district, used for conversion and productivity analysis.']
  bopis_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Buy Online Pickup In Store capability is enabled for stores in this district.']
  comp_store_sales_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Year-over-year comparable store sales growth target percentage for the district.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this district record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO currency code used for financial reporting and transactions within this district.']
  district_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the district used in operational systems and reporting. Typically follows a regional prefix pattern.']
  district_manager_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the district manager for quick reference and reporting purposes.']
  district_name varchar [note: 'Official name of the district used for business communication and reporting.']
  district_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the district based on store composition and market characteristics.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this district configuration ceased to be effective. Null for currently active districts.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when this district configuration became effective in the organizational structure.']
  headquarters_address_line_1 varchar [note: 'Primary street address line for the district headquarters office.']
  headquarters_address_line_2 varchar [note: 'Secondary address line for suite, floor, or building information for the district headquarters.']
  headquarters_city varchar [note: 'City where the district headquarters office is located.']
  headquarters_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the district headquarters location.']
  headquarters_email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for district headquarters communications.']
  headquarters_phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the district headquarters office.']
  headquarters_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the district headquarters office location.']
  headquarters_state_province varchar [note: 'State or province where the district headquarters office is located.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this district record was last updated in the system.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form text field for additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to the district.']
  omnichannel_fulfillment_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether stores in this district are enabled for omnichannel fulfillment capabilities including Buy Online Pickup In Store (BOPIS) and ship-from-store.']
  sap_car_integration_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether stores in this district are integrated with SAP Customer Activity Repository for traffic and customer analytics.']
  ship_from_store_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether ship-from-store fulfillment capability is enabled for stores in this district.']
  shrinkage_target_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target shrinkage rate as a percentage of sales for the district, used for loss prevention performance measurement.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the district in the organizational structure.']
  store_count varchar [note: 'Total number of active stores currently assigned to this district.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'IANA time zone identifier for the district headquarters location, used for scheduling and reporting alignment.']
  total_selling_square_footage decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate selling square footage across all stores in the district, used for productivity and sales per square foot analysis.']
  visual_merchandising_standard varchar [note: 'Visual merchandising standard tier applied to stores within this district, determining display guidelines and fixture requirements.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for district. Referenced by district_id.'
}

Table store.planogram {
  planogram_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for planogram']
  superseded_planogram_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on planogram (superseded_planogram_id)']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval workflow status of the planogram in the design and review process.']
  approved_by_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the merchandising manager or executive who approved this planogram for deployment.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this planogram was officially approved for store implementation.']
  average_unit_retail_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average unit retail price in USD of products included in this planogram, used for sales forecasting.']
  category_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary product category this planogram is designed for.']
  climate_zone varchar [note: 'Climate zone classification for which this planogram is optimized, affecting seasonal product mix.']
  color_story varchar [note: 'Dominant color palette or color blocking strategy used in this planogram to create visual impact.']
  compliance_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether strict compliance to this planogram is mandatory or if stores have flexibility to adapt.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for country-specific planogram variations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this planogram record was first created in the system.']
  digital_integration_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this planogram includes digital display elements, QR codes, or interactive technology.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when this planogram is scheduled to be retired and replaced with a new layout. Null for open-ended planograms.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when this planogram becomes active and should be implemented in stores.']
  fixture_count varchar [note: 'Number of fixtures or display units required to implement this planogram.']
  fixture_type varchar [note: 'Primary type of retail fixture or display unit this planogram is designed for.']
  floor_space_sqm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total floor space in square meters required to implement this planogram.']
  height_cm decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum vertical height in centimeters of the planogram display from floor to top shelf.']
  implementation_duration_hours decimal(6,2) [note: 'Estimated time in hours required for store staff to implement this planogram from start to completion.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this planogram record was last updated or modified.']
  merchandising_zone varchar [note: 'Strategic zone within the store where this planogram is intended to be placed for optimal customer engagement.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional implementation instructions, special considerations, or merchandising tips for store teams.']
  omnichannel_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this planogram supports omnichannel features such as buy online pickup in store (BOPIS) or ship from store integration.']
  parent_planogram_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the previous version of this planogram if this is a revision. Null for original planograms.']
  planogram_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the planogram used across systems and communications.']
  planogram_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the planogram including merchandising strategy, target customer segment, and visual presentation goals.']
  planogram_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title of the planogram describing its purpose or target category.']
  planogram_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the planogram based on merchandising strategy and product lifecycle stage.']
  price_point_strategy varchar [note: 'Pricing tier strategy for products featured in this planogram.']
  projected_sales_per_sqm_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Forecasted sales revenue per square meter in USD expected from this planogram based on historical performance.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Geographic region code where this planogram is intended to be deployed (e.g., NAM, EUR, APAC).']
  season_code varchar [note: 'Fashion season identifier for which this planogram is designed (e.g., SS24 for Spring/Summer 2024, FW24 for Fall/Winter 2024).']
  store_format varchar [note: 'Type of retail store format this planogram is designed for, reflecting store size and merchandising approach.']
  style_theme varchar [note: 'Fashion style theme or aesthetic direction of the planogram (e.g., athleisure, minimalist, bold prints, heritage).']
  subcategory_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific product subcategory within the category that this planogram targets.']
  sustainability_rating varchar [note: 'Sustainability rating of the planogram based on percentage of eco-friendly and sustainable products featured.']
  target_demographic varchar [note: 'Primary customer demographic segment this planogram is designed to appeal to (e.g., women 25-40, men athletic, youth streetwear).']
  total_sku_count varchar [note: 'Total number of unique SKUs included in this planogram layout.']
  total_unit_capacity varchar [note: 'Maximum number of individual product units that can be displayed when the planogram is fully stocked.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version number of this planogram, incremented with each revision or update.']
  visual_merchandiser_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the visual merchandiser or designer who created this planogram.']
  wall_space_linear_m decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total linear wall space in meters required for wall-mounted fixtures in this planogram.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for planogram. Referenced by planogram_id.'
}

Table ecommerce.digital_storefront {
  digital_storefront_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the digital storefront instance. Primary key.']
  brand_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the brand this storefront represents.']
  carbon_target_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.carbon_target. Business justification: Links regional/brand-specific storefronts to their carbon reduction commitments for localized ESG disclosure (e.g., EU Green Claims Directive requires market-specific targets). Enables storefront-leve']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Storefronts incur operating costs (hosting, payment processing, customer service, marketing) that must be allocated to cost centers for expense tracking, budgeting, and variance analysis.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who last modified this storefront configuration.']
  inventory_pool_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the inventory pool from which this storefront fulfills orders.']
  price_book_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the price book used for pricing on this storefront.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Each digital storefront operates as a distinct profit center for P&L reporting, performance analysis, and management accountability. Standard practice in multi-brand/multi-region apparel e-commerce fi']
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_filing. Business justification: Digital storefronts operating in specific jurisdictions require regulatory filings for data privacy (GDPR, CCPA), consumer protection, and accessibility compliance. Compliance teams track jurisdiction']
  accessibility_wcag_level varchar [note: 'WCAG accessibility compliance level achieved by this storefront (A, AA, AAA, or not certified).']
  analytics_tracking_code varchar [note: 'Google Analytics or Adobe Analytics tracking ID configured for this storefront.']
  catalog_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary product catalog assigned to this storefront.']
  ccpa_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the storefront is configured to comply with CCPA requirements for California customers.']
  channel_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the digital channel type. DTC = Direct-to-Consumer, PWA = Progressive Web App.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the storefront\'s primary market (e.g., \'USA\', \'GBR\', \'DEU\').']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this storefront record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for transactions on this storefront (e.g., \'USD\', \'EUR\', \'GBP\').']
  customer_service_email varchar [note: 'Primary customer service email address for this storefront. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  customer_service_phone varchar [note: 'Primary customer service phone number for this storefront. Organizational contact data classified as confidential.']
  domain_url varchar [note: 'Primary domain URL for the digital storefront (e.g., \'https://www.apparelfashion.com\').']
  gdpr_compliant boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the storefront is configured to comply with GDPR requirements for EU customers.']
  guest_checkout_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether customers can complete purchases without creating an account.']
  launch_date date [note: 'Date when the digital storefront was first launched and made available to customers.']
  locale_code varchar [note: 'ISO locale code representing language and region (e.g., \'en_US\', \'fr_FR\', \'de_DE\').']
  loyalty_program_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a loyalty program is active and integrated with this storefront.']
  mobile_app_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a dedicated mobile application is available for this storefront.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this storefront record was last modified.']
  operational_status varchar [note: 'Current operational state of the digital storefront.']
  payment_gateway varchar [note: 'Name of the payment gateway provider integrated with this storefront (e.g., \'Stripe\', \'PayPal\', \'Adyen\').']
  personalization_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether AI-driven personalization features are enabled for this storefront.']
  platform_version varchar [note: 'Version of the e-commerce platform powering this storefront (e.g., Salesforce Commerce Cloud version).']
  primary_language varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code for the storefront\'s primary language.']
  pwa_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Progressive Web App functionality is enabled for this storefront.']
  region_code varchar [note: 'Business region code for the storefront (e.g., \'NA\' for North America, \'EMEA\' for Europe/Middle East/Africa, \'APAC\' for Asia-Pacific).']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date when the storefront was or will be retired from active service. Null if still active.']
  seo_description varchar [note: 'Default SEO meta description for the storefront homepage used for search engine optimization.']
  seo_title varchar [note: 'Default SEO title tag for the storefront homepage used for search engine optimization.']
  shipping_origin_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the primary shipping origin for orders from this storefront.']
  social_commerce_enabled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether social commerce integrations (Instagram Shopping, Facebook Shops) are enabled.']
  storefront_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code for the digital storefront, used for external references and integrations.']
  storefront_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the digital storefront (e.g., \'Apparel Fashion US\', \'Outlet Store EU\').']
  storefront_type varchar [note: 'Business classification of the storefront purpose (flagship brand site, regional site, outlet microsite, seasonal campaign site).']
  tax_jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Tax jurisdiction code applicable to transactions on this storefront for sales tax calculation.']
  timezone varchar [note: 'IANA timezone identifier for the storefront\'s operational timezone (e.g., \'America/New_York\', \'Europe/London\').']

  Note: 'Master record for each digital storefront or site instance operated by Apparel Fashion, including DTC brand sites, regional storefronts, outlet microsites, and channel classification (DTC web, mobile app, PWA, social commerce). Captures site identity, locale, currency, brand affiliation, domain URL, launch date, platform version, operational status, and channel type. Serves as the top-level anchor for all site-level configuration, catalog assignments, channel performance attribution, CAC measurement, and AOV benchmarking.'
}

Table ecommerce.web_session {
  web_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the web session on the digital storefront. Primary key.']
  digital_storefront_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ecommerce.digital_storefront. Business justification: Web sessions occur on a specific digital storefront. The session captures storefront-specific behavior (landing page, exit page, channel). This is a standard N:1 relationship - many sessions belong to']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer associated with this session. Null for anonymous sessions.']
  add_to_cart_count varchar [note: 'Number of times the user added items to the shopping cart during the session.']
  bounce_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the session was a bounce (single page view with no interaction). True if bounce, False otherwise.']
  browser varchar [note: 'Web browser used during the session (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge).']
  browser_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the web browser used during the session.']
  channel varchar [note: 'Marketing channel through which the user arrived at the digital storefront. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: organic|paid_search|social|email|direct|referral|display|affiliate — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  checkout_initiated_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the user initiated the checkout process during the session. True if initiated, False otherwise.']
  conversion_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the session resulted in a conversion event (e.g., purchase, signup). True if converted, False otherwise.']
  cookie_consent_status varchar [note: 'Status of the user\'s cookie consent during the session for GDPR and CCPA compliance.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this session record was first created in the data platform.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used to access the digital storefront during this session.']
  exit_page_url varchar [note: 'The last page URL visited by the user before ending the session.']
  geographic_city varchar [note: 'City name derived from the session IP address geolocation.']
  geographic_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code derived from the session IP address (e.g., USA, GBR, FRA).']
  geographic_region varchar [note: 'Geographic region or state derived from the session IP address.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'Internet Protocol address of the device used during the session. May be anonymized for privacy compliance.']
  landing_page_url varchar [note: 'The first page URL visited by the user when entering the digital storefront in this session.']
  language_preference varchar [note: 'Two-letter ISO language code representing the user\'s browser language preference (e.g., en, es, fr).']
  operating_system varchar [note: 'Operating system of the device used during the session (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, macOS).']
  operating_system_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the operating system used during the session.']
  page_views varchar [note: 'Total number of pages viewed during the session.']
  product_page_views varchar [note: 'Number of product detail pages viewed during the session.']
  referral_source varchar [note: 'The referring URL or source that directed the user to the digital storefront.']
  search_query_count varchar [note: 'Number of search queries performed by the user during the session.']
  session_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Total duration of the session in seconds, calculated from start to end timestamp.']
  session_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the web session ended or timed out. Null for active sessions.']
  session_source_platform varchar [note: 'The commerce platform or application that captured this session data (e.g., Salesforce Commerce Cloud).']
  session_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the web session was initiated on the digital storefront.']
  session_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the web session.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this session record was last updated in the data platform.']
  utm_campaign varchar [note: 'UTM parameter identifying the specific marketing campaign name.']
  utm_content varchar [note: 'UTM parameter used to differentiate similar content or links within the same campaign.']
  utm_medium varchar [note: 'UTM parameter identifying the marketing medium (e.g., cpc, email, social, organic).']
  utm_source varchar [note: 'UTM parameter identifying the source of the traffic (e.g., google, facebook, newsletter).']
  utm_term varchar [note: 'UTM parameter identifying paid search keywords or terms.']

  Note: 'Captures individual shopper web sessions on the digital storefront, including session start/end timestamps, device type, browser, OS, referral source, UTM parameters, landing page, exit page, page views, bounce flag, session duration, and key behavioral events (search queries, product page views, filter usage, size/color selection patterns). Sourced from the commerce platform tag layer. Foundational for conversion funnel analysis, CAC measurement, personalization triggering, digital customer journey mapping, and cookie consent state tracking during the browsing session.'
}

Table ecommerce.site_catalog {
  site_catalog_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the site catalog. Primary key.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Catalogs are often campaign-specific (holiday gift guide, seasonal launch catalog). Enables campaign performance reporting by catalog and supports merchandising-marketing alignment on featured assortm']
  circular_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.circular_program. Business justification: Links seasonal/regional catalogs to applicable take-back, resale, or rental programs for EPR compliance and customer communication. Real business need: EU textile EPR regulations require catalogs to r']
  digital_storefront_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital storefront where this catalog is published.']
  merchandiser_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Catalogs are curated by merchandising employees who manage assortment, pricing, and publication workflows. Links enable workload tracking, approval routing, and performance measurement for catalog man']
  parent_catalog_site_catalog_id varchar [note: 'Reference to a parent catalog if this catalog is a subset or variant. Nullable for top-level catalogs. Enables catalog inheritance and hierarchical merchandising.']
  price_book_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the price book that governs pricing for products in this catalog. Links to merchandising domain for price management.']
  season_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the merchandising season this catalog represents (e.g., Spring 2024, Fall/Winter 2023). Links to the merchandising domain for seasonal planning context.']
  active_from_date date [note: 'The date when this catalog becomes visible and shoppable on the storefront. Part of the catalog\'s effective date range.']
  active_sku_count varchar [note: 'The number of SKUs currently active and available for purchase within this catalog. Subset of total SKU count, excluding out-of-stock or discontinued items.']
  active_to_date date [note: 'The date when this catalog is no longer visible on the storefront. Nullable for catalogs with no planned end date (evergreen catalogs).']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'The approval workflow status for this catalog. Catalogs must be approved before they can be published to the storefront.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this catalog was approved for publication. Nullable if not yet approved.']
  catalog_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier code for the catalog used in system integrations and reporting.']
  catalog_description varchar [note: 'Detailed business description of the catalog\'s purpose, target audience, and merchandising strategy. Used for internal planning and external marketing copy.']
  catalog_name varchar [note: 'Business name of the catalog (e.g., Spring 2024 Collection, Outlet Clearance, Holiday Gift Guide).']
  catalog_priority varchar [note: 'Numeric priority ranking used when multiple catalogs are active on the same storefront. Higher values take precedence for product display and search ranking.']
  catalog_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the catalog by merchandising strategy: seasonal (time-bound collection), evergreen (year-round core), outlet (clearance), promotional (campaign-driven), exclusive (member-only), or limited edition (special release).']
  country_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes where this catalog is available (e.g., USA,CAN,MEX). Empty for global catalogs.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this catalog record was first created in the system. Immutable audit field.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The primary currency for pricing in this catalog (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All product prices are displayed in this currency unless overridden by customer locale.']
  default_locale varchar [note: 'The primary language and region locale for this catalog (e.g., en_US, fr_FR, de_DE). Determines default product names, descriptions, and pricing display.']
  external_catalog_reference varchar [note: 'The catalog identifier from an external system (e.g., Oracle Retail, legacy PLM). Used for system integration and data lineage tracking.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'The geographic reach of this catalog: global (available worldwide), regional (multi-country region), or country-specific (single market).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this catalog record was last updated. Tracks content changes, SKU additions/removals, and metadata updates.']
  merchandising_theme varchar [note: 'The creative or marketing theme for this catalog (e.g., Summer Essentials, Back to School, Holiday Gift Guide, Sustainability Collection). Used for site merchandising and campaign alignment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for internal notes, special instructions, or merchandising commentary about this catalog. Not displayed to customers.']
  promotion_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether products in this catalog are eligible for promotional discounts and offers. False for outlet or already-discounted catalogs.']
  publication_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the catalog: draft (being prepared), scheduled (approved for future publication), published (live and shoppable), suspended (temporarily hidden), or archived (no longer active).']
  published_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this catalog was first published to the storefront. Nullable for catalogs that have never been published.']
  search_indexing_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether products in this catalog are included in site search results. May be disabled for exclusive or hidden catalogs.']
  seo_enabled_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether products in this catalog are indexed by external search engines (Google, Bing). Disabled for member-only or pre-launch catalogs.']
  target_customer_segment varchar [note: 'The primary customer segment this catalog is merchandised for (e.g., VIP Members, New Customers, Youth, Professional Athletes). Used for personalization and targeted marketing.']
  total_sku_count varchar [note: 'The total number of unique SKUs included in this catalog. Used for catalog size tracking and assortment breadth analysis.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'The version number of this catalog. Incremented each time the catalog is republished with changes. Supports catalog versioning and rollback.']

  Note: 'Defines the online product catalog published to each digital storefront, including catalog name, associated storefront, active date range, catalog type (seasonal, evergreen, outlet), publication status, and total SKU count. Manages which product assortment is visible and shoppable on each site at any given time. Links to the product domain for SKU-level detail while owning the digital publication lifecycle.'
}

  concept_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to design.concept. Business justification: E-commerce catalogs are merchandised by design concept for thematic storytelling and campaign cohesion. Merchandisers group products by concept to create concept-driven landing pages and seasonal narr']
  ecolabel_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.ecolabel. Business justification: Online product detail pages must display FTC-compliant labeling information (fiber content, care, country of origin). Digital merchandising teams link catalog listings to approved FTC labels to ensure']
  merchandise_hierarchy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to merchandising.merchandise_hierarchy. This is how digital stor']
  product_safety_test_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.product_safety_test. Business justification: Digital merchandising requires safety test clearance before publishing SKUs to online catalogs. Merchandising teams verify test completion and pass/fail status during catalog setup to ensure only comp']
  site_catalog_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital storefront or e-commerce site where this product is listed. Supports multi-site catalog management.']
  size_scale_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the size chart or fit guide associated with this product listing. Helps customers select appropriate size.']
  sketch_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to design.design_sketch. Business justification: Digital merchandisers trace listed products to originating design sketches for creative attribution, design performance ROI analysis, and designer productivity measurement. Essential for design-to-com']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product master SKU being listed on the digital catalog. Links this listing to the core product entity.']

Business justification: Product listings must display applicable quality/sustainability certifications (OEKO-TEX, GOTS, Fair Trade) for regulatory compliance and customer transparency.   vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supplier.vendor. Business justification: Digital merchandising requires vendor attribution for catalog products to manage vendor-funded digital promotions, co-op advertising budgets, and measure vendor performance by online sales channel. Dr']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.work_order. Business justification: Pre-order catalog listings must reference specific production work orders to calculate accurate expected ship dates, manage inventory promises, and coordinate go-live timing with production completion']
  average_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Calculated average customer rating score for this product listing, typically on a 1-5 scale. Displayed to influence purchase decisions.']
  badge_color varchar [note: 'Hexadecimal color code or predefined color name for the product badge. Controls visual presentation of promotional badges.']
  badge_text varchar [note: 'Optional promotional or informational badge text displayed on the product tile or detail page (e.g., Sale, Limited Edition, Sustainable).']
  browsable_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product listing should appear in category browse pages and navigation menus.']
  canonical_url varchar [note: 'The canonical URL path for this product listing. Used for SEO to prevent duplicate content issues and establish the authoritative product page.']
  digital_price_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the digital price override. Required when digital price override is populated.']
  digital_price_override decimal(15,2) [note: 'Optional price override specific to the digital channel. When populated, this price supersedes the standard retail price for online transactions.']
  display_sequence varchar [note: 'Numeric ordering value controlling the position of this product in catalog browse and search results. Lower values appear first.']
  expected_ship_date date [note: 'Expected date when pre-order or back-ordered items will ship to customers. Manages customer expectations for delayed fulfillment.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'The date when this product listing expires and is automatically removed from the digital storefront. Supports time-limited offerings.']
  go_live_date date [note: 'The date when this product listing becomes active and visible to customers on the digital storefront. Supports scheduled product launches.']
  inventory_display_mode varchar [note: 'Controls how inventory availability is displayed to customers on the product listing (exact quantity, low stock warning, simple in-stock indicator, or hidden).']
  is_bestseller boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product qualifies as a bestseller based on sales velocity and should be merchandised accordingly.']
  is_featured boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product is featured or promoted on the digital storefront. Featured products receive priority placement.']
  is_new_arrival boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product should be displayed with new arrival badge or in new arrivals collection.']
  is_online_exclusive boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product is available exclusively through the digital channel and not in physical retail stores.']
  listing_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this catalog product listing record was first created in the system. Audit trail for listing lifecycle.']
  listing_status varchar [note: 'Current publication status of the product listing on the digital storefront. Determines visibility and availability to customers.']
  listing_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this catalog product listing record was last modified. Tracks merchandising changes and content updates.']
  locale_code varchar [note: 'Language and region locale code for this product listing (e.g., en_US, fr_FR). Supports multi-language and multi-region catalog management.']
  low_stock_threshold varchar [note: 'Inventory quantity threshold below which the low stock warning is displayed to customers. Drives urgency messaging.']
  personalization_segment varchar [note: 'Customer segment or persona code used for personalized product recommendations and targeted merchandising on the digital storefront.']
  pre_order_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product is available for pre-order before official release date. Supports launch campaigns.']
  recommendation_priority varchar [note: 'Numeric priority score used by recommendation engines to rank this product in personalized product suggestions and cross-sell opportunities.']
  review_count varchar [note: 'Total number of customer reviews submitted for this product listing. Provides social proof and credibility.']
  searchable_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product listing should be included in site search results and search engine indexing.']
  seo_keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords and phrases for search engine optimization and internal site search relevance.']
  seo_meta_description varchar [note: 'Meta description tag content for search engine results pages. Summarizes product listing in 150-160 characters to drive click-through.']
  seo_title varchar [note: 'Optimized page title for search engine indexing and display in search results. Typically 50-60 characters for optimal display.']
  shipping_restriction_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator whether this product has shipping restrictions (e.g., hazardous materials, oversized, international restrictions).']
  suppression_reason varchar [note: 'Code or description explaining why this product listing is suppressed from the digital storefront (e.g., quality issue, compliance, inventory).']
  tax_category_code varchar [note: 'Tax classification code for this product listing. Determines applicable sales tax rates and rules for digital transactions.']
  three_sixty_view_url varchar [note: 'URL to the interactive 360-degree product view asset. Provides immersive product visualization experience.']
  url_slug varchar [note: 'Human-readable URL-friendly identifier derived from product name. Used in constructing the product detail page URL path.']
  video_url varchar [note: 'URL to the primary product video showcasing the item. Enhances product presentation and conversion rates.']

  Note: 'Represents the published listing of a specific SKU or style on a digital storefront catalog, including listing status (active, suppressed, out-of-stock), display sequence, featured flag, online exclusive flag, digital price override, SEO title, SEO meta description, canonical URL, and go-live/expiry dates. Distinct from the product master — this entity owns the digital merchandising and publication attributes for each SKU on each site.'
}

Table ecommerce.cart {
  cart_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the shopping cart instance. Primary key.']
  billing_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer address selected for billing. May be null if address not yet selected.']
  digital_storefront_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital storefront where this cart was created. Enables multi-brand and multi-locale cart tracking.']
  fulfillment_distribution_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.distribution_center. Business justification: Carts check real-time inventory availability against specific DC pools to calculate ATP and display accurate stock status. Critical for preventing overselling and enabling DC-specific inventory reserv']
  merged_from_cart_id varchar [note: 'Reference to another cart that was merged into this cart. Occurs when a guest shopper logs in and their guest cart is merged with their authenticated cart.']
  packaging_sustainability_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.packaging_sustainability. Business justification: Associates cart sessions with packaging sustainability profiles for checkout-time carbon footprint display and packaging preference capture (e.g., plastic-free option). Real business need: checkout fl']
  payment_method_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer payment method selected for this cart. May be null if payment method not yet selected.']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer who owns this cart. Links to authenticated or guest customer profile.']
  promotion_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the primary promotion applied to the cart. Links to the merchandising promotion master.']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales order created when this cart was successfully converted. Null if cart has not been converted.']
  shipping_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer address selected for shipping. May be null if address not yet selected.']
  web_session_id varchar [note: 'Unique session identifier from the e-commerce platform tracking the shopper\'s browsing session. Used for abandoned cart recovery and session analytics.']
  ab_test_variant varchar [note: 'Identifier for the A/B test variant or experience shown to this shopper. Used for conversion rate optimization and multivariate testing analysis.']
  abandoned_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart was classified as abandoned based on inactivity threshold. Triggers abandoned cart recovery campaigns.']
  cart_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the shopping cart. Active = shopper is actively browsing; Abandoned = shopper left without checkout; Converted = cart was successfully checked out; Merged = cart was merged with another; Expired = cart aged out per retention policy; Saved = shopper explicitly saved for later.']
  cart_type varchar [note: 'Classification of cart purpose. Standard = regular shopping cart; Wishlist = saved items for future purchase; Registry = gift registry or wedding registry; Subscription = recurring order cart.']
  channel_source varchar [note: 'Marketing channel or traffic source that brought the customer to the cart. Used for Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) and channel attribution analysis.']
  converted_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart was successfully converted to a sales order. Marks the completion of the purchase journey.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart was first created. Marks the beginning of the shopping session.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary values in this cart. Determined by the digital storefront locale.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used to create and interact with the cart. Used for device-specific analytics and responsive design optimization.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to the cart from all promotions, coupon codes, and markdowns. Reduces the subtotal.']
  expiration_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the cart will expire and be purged from the system per data retention policy. Typically 30-90 days from last modification.']
  gift_message varchar [note: 'Optional gift message text entered by the customer for gift orders. Printed on packing slip or gift card.']
  gift_wrap_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the customer has requested gift wrapping for items in this cart. May incur additional charges.']
  guest_checkout_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this cart belongs to a guest (non-authenticated) shopper. Guest carts have limited personalization and no saved payment methods.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'IP address of the device used to create the cart. Used for fraud detection and geographic analytics. May be considered PII under GDPR.']
  item_count varchar [note: 'Total number of distinct line items (SKUs) in the cart. Does not account for quantity per line.']
  locale_code varchar [note: 'Locale code (language and region) for the cart, determining language, currency, and regional preferences. Format: language_REGION (e.g., en_US, fr_FR, de_DE).']
  loyalty_points_applied varchar [note: 'Number of loyalty program points the customer has elected to redeem against this cart. Converted to discount amount based on points-to-currency ratio.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the cart (item added, removed, quantity changed, or promotion applied). Used to calculate cart abandonment time windows.']
  personalization_segment varchar [note: 'Customer segment code used for personalized pricing, product recommendations, and targeted promotions. Driven by Adobe Experience Platform or similar CDP.']
  shipping_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated shipping cost for the cart. Final shipping cost is determined at checkout based on selected shipping method and destination.']
  shipping_method_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the selected or estimated shipping method (e.g., standard, express, overnight). Used to calculate shipping cost and delivery estimate.']
  subtotal_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of all line item subtotals before discounts, taxes, and shipping. Represents the gross merchandise value in the cart.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated sales tax or VAT amount for the cart. Final tax is calculated at checkout based on shipping address.']
  total_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total cart value including subtotal, discounts, estimated tax, and estimated shipping. Represents the expected order total if the cart is converted.']
  unit_count varchar [note: 'Total quantity of all units across all line items in the cart. Sum of all line item quantities.']
  user_agent varchar [note: 'Browser user agent string capturing browser type, version, and operating system. Used for compatibility testing and device analytics.']
  utm_campaign varchar [note: 'UTM campaign tracking parameter from the referring URL. Used for digital marketing campaign attribution and ROI measurement.']
  utm_medium varchar [note: 'UTM medium tracking parameter identifying the marketing medium (e.g., cpc, email, social). Used for channel attribution.']
  utm_source varchar [note: 'UTM source tracking parameter identifying the traffic source (e.g., google, facebook, newsletter). Used for channel attribution.']

  Note: 'Captures the complete shopping cart state for each shopper on the digital storefront, including cart header (creation timestamp, last modified, status, currency, applied promotions, estimated shipping/tax) and line-item detail (SKU, style, colorway, size, quantity, unit price, line subtotal, discount, gift flag, add-to-cart timestamp). Tracks pre-checkout purchase intent at both aggregate and SKU level. Critical for abandoned cart recovery, AOV optimization, and product affinity modeling.'
}

Table ecommerce.checkout_session {
  checkout_session_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the checkout session. Primary key for this entity.']
  cart_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ecommerce.cart. Business justification: Checkout session processes a specific shopping cart. This FK links the checkout flow back to the cart being checked out. Business value: trace checkout abandonment back to cart state, analyze cart-to-']
  digital_storefront_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital storefront where the checkout session occurred.']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer profile initiating the checkout. Null for guest checkout sessions.']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the sales order created upon successful checkout completion. Null if checkout was abandoned or errored.']
  selected_carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Checkout sessions capture customer-selected carrier for shipping method choice, rate calculation, and delivery promise. Essential for order fulfillment instructions and carrier performance tracking by']
  abandonment_step varchar [note: 'The specific checkout step where the customer abandoned the session. None if checkout was completed.']
  browser_type varchar [note: 'Web browser type and version used during the checkout session (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox).']
  checkout_abandonment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the checkout session was abandoned by the customer or timed out. Null if not abandoned.']
  checkout_completion_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the checkout was successfully completed and order was placed. Null if not completed.']
  checkout_duration_seconds varchar [note: 'Total duration of the checkout session in seconds from start to completion or abandonment.']
  checkout_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the customer initiated the checkout process from the shopping cart.']
  checkout_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the checkout session indicating the final outcome or current state.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the checkout session record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used by the customer to complete the checkout session.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount amount applied to the order from promotional codes, loyalty points, or other offers.']
  error_code varchar [note: 'System error code if the checkout session encountered a technical error. Null if no error occurred.']
  error_message varchar [note: 'Detailed error message describing the technical failure that prevented checkout completion. Null if no error occurred.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated delivery date presented to the customer at checkout based on selected shipping method.']
  gift_message_included boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the customer included a gift message with the order during checkout.']
  guest_checkout_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the checkout was completed as a guest without customer account login.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'IP address of the customer device during the checkout session for fraud detection and analytics.']
  locale_code varchar [note: 'Locale code representing the language and regional settings used during checkout (e.g., en_US, fr_FR).']
  loyalty_points_redeemed varchar [note: 'Number of loyalty program points redeemed by the customer during checkout. Zero if no points used.']
  marketing_consent_captured boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the customer provided opt-in consent for marketing communications during checkout.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the checkout session record was last modified or updated.']
  payment_failure_reason varchar [note: 'Reason code or description for payment authorization failure if payment was declined. Null if payment succeeded or was not attempted.']
  payment_gateway varchar [note: 'Payment gateway provider used to process the transaction (e.g., Stripe, Adyen, PayPal, Authorize.Net).']
  payment_method_type varchar [note: 'Type of payment method used or selected during checkout. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: credit_card|debit_card|paypal|apple_pay|google_pay|gift_card|store_credit|buy_now_pay_later — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  promo_code_applied varchar [note: 'Promotional code entered and applied by the customer during checkout. Null if no promo code used.']
  session_token varchar [note: 'Unique session token generated by Salesforce Commerce Cloud to track the checkout session across steps.']
  shipping_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Shipping charge amount for the selected shipping method.']
  shipping_method_selected varchar [note: 'The shipping method chosen by the customer during checkout.']
  steps_completed varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of checkout steps completed by the customer (e.g., address_entry, shipping_selection, payment_entry, order_review).']
  subtotal_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Subtotal amount of all items in the cart before shipping, tax, and discounts.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax amount calculated for the order based on shipping address and tax jurisdiction.']
  total_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Final total amount of the order including subtotal, shipping, tax, and discounts.']
  transactional_consent_captured boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the customer provided consent for transactional communications (order updates, shipping notifications) during checkout.']

  Note: 'Tracks the checkout flow from cart confirmation through order placement, capturing checkout start timestamp, steps completed (address entry, shipping method selection, payment entry, order review), step abandonment point, selected shipping method (standard, express, next-day, click-and-collect, same-day) with carrier reference and delivery estimate, payment method type, promo code applied, checkout duration, marketing and transactional consent opt-ins captured at checkout, and outcome (completed, abandoned, errored). Enables checkout funnel optimization, shipping preference analysis, and payment failure root-cause investigation.'
}

Table ecommerce.digital_order {
  digital_order_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the digital order placed through the DTC e-commerce channel. Primary key for this entity.']
  ar_invoice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.ar_invoice. Business justification: Digital orders generate AR invoices for revenue recognition, receivables tracking, and financial reporting. Essential for order-to-cash process and revenue reconciliation in apparel e-commerce operati']
  assigned_carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Orders track assigned carrier for shipment execution, customer tracking notifications, delivery performance monitoring, and carrier cost reconciliation. Fundamental to order fulfillment operations and']
  billing_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer address used for billing and payment verification. May differ from shipping address.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Orders attributed to campaigns for ROAS calculation, CAC measurement, and campaign effectiveness reporting. Core marketing-ecommerce integration for performance measurement and budget allocation decis']
  digital_storefront_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific digital storefront where this order was placed. Identifies the brand, locale, and channel configuration.']
  finance_payment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.finance_payment. Business justification: Links customer payments to orders for cash application, AR clearing, and payment reconciliation. Critical for order-to-cash cycle completion and accounts receivable management in e-commerce.']
  fulfillment_distribution_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.distribution_center. Business justification: Orders route to specific DCs based on inventory location, shipping proximity, and capacity. Critical for order orchestration, pick/pack instructions, and delivery promise accuracy in multi-DC apparel ']
  profile_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer who placed this order. Links to the customer master record in the customer domain.']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'FK to order.sales_order.sales_order_id — MUST-HAVE: Enables reconciliation of DTC e-commerce orders with the unified order management system. Without this, revenue reporting and fulfillment tracking across channels is fragmented.']
  season_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to merchandising.season. Business justification: Digital orders require season attribution for seasonal sales performance analysis, collection sell-through reporting, and merchandise planning feedback. Critical for understanding which season\'s merch']
  shipping_address_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the customer address where the order will be shipped. Links to customer address master data.']
  web_session_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the customer web session during which the order was placed. Enables journey analysis and attribution.']
  channel_type varchar [note: 'Digital channel interface through which the order was placed. Distinguishes between web browser, native mobile app, progressive web app, social commerce, or third-party marketplace.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when this order record was first created in the e-commerce platform database.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this order. Supports multi-currency e-commerce operations.']
  customer_email varchar [note: 'Email address provided by the customer for order confirmation and shipping notifications. Required for guest checkout orders.']
  customer_notes varchar [note: 'Special delivery instructions or comments provided by the customer at checkout. Communicated to fulfillment and carrier.']
  customer_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number provided by the customer for delivery coordination and order updates. May be used by carrier for delivery notifications.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Type of device used by the customer to place the order. Supports device-specific conversion analysis.']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to the order including promotional codes, loyalty rewards, and markdowns. Reduces the subtotal.']
  estimated_delivery_date date [note: 'Estimated date when the order is expected to be delivered to the customer. Calculated based on fulfillment method and carrier SLA.']
  fraud_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of manual or automated fraud review for this order. Orders flagged for fraud may be held pending investigation.']
  fraud_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated fraud risk score from payment gateway or fraud detection service. Higher scores indicate higher risk. Scale typically 0-100.']
  fulfillment_method varchar [note: 'Method by which the order will be delivered to the customer. Supports omnichannel fulfillment options.']
  fulfillment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of order fulfillment operations. Tracks warehouse and logistics progression independent of payment status. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: pending|allocated|picked|packed|shipped|delivered|cancelled — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  gift_message varchar [note: 'Optional personalized message provided by the customer for gift orders. Printed on packing slip or gift card.']
  grand_total_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Final total amount charged to the customer. Calculated as subtotal minus discounts plus shipping plus tax.']
  ip_address varchar [note: 'Internet Protocol address of the device used to place the order. Used for fraud detection and geographic analysis.']
  is_gift boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this order was marked as a gift by the customer. Triggers gift wrapping and receipt exclusion.']
  is_guest_checkout boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the order was placed by a guest user without creating an account. Impacts customer acquisition tracking.']
  loyalty_points_earned varchar [note: 'Number of loyalty program points earned by the customer for this purchase. Supports CLTV and retention programs.']
  loyalty_points_redeemed varchar [note: 'Number of loyalty program points redeemed by the customer as payment or discount on this order.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'System timestamp when this order record was last updated. Tracks any changes to order status, payment, or fulfillment details.']
  order_notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes or special instructions added by customer service representatives or automated systems regarding order handling.']
  order_number varchar [note: 'Customer-facing order confirmation number displayed in order confirmation emails and customer account portal. Externally-known business identifier for this transaction.']
  order_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the digital order in the fulfillment workflow. Tracks progression from placement through delivery or cancellation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: pending|confirmed|processing|shipped|delivered|cancelled|refunded — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  payment_method_type varchar [note: 'Type of payment instrument used by the customer. Distinguishes between card payments, digital wallets, and buy-now-pay-later options. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: credit_card|debit_card|paypal|apple_pay|google_pay|afterpay|klarna|gift_card — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of payment processing for this order. Tracks authorization, capture, and refund lifecycle.']
  placed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the customer completed checkout and placed the order. Principal business event timestamp for this transaction.']
  promotion_code varchar [note: 'Promotional or coupon code applied by the customer at checkout. Used for discount attribution and campaign tracking.']
  referrer_url varchar [note: 'URL of the page or external site that referred the customer to the storefront. Supports marketing attribution and channel analysis.']
  shipping_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Shipping and handling charges applied to the order. May be zero for free shipping promotions.']
  subtotal_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Sum of all line item prices before discounts, shipping, and taxes. Base merchandise value of the order.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total sales tax, VAT, or other applicable taxes calculated for this order based on shipping destination and tax jurisdiction.']
  user_agent varchar [note: 'Browser and operating system information from the device used to place the order. Supports technical analytics and compatibility tracking.']
  utm_campaign varchar [note: 'Marketing campaign name parameter from the URL. Identifies the specific campaign driving this order for ROI measurement.']
  utm_medium varchar [note: 'Marketing campaign medium parameter from the URL. Identifies the marketing channel type (e.g., cpc, email, social, organic).']
  utm_source varchar [note: 'Marketing campaign source parameter from the URL. Identifies the platform or publisher driving traffic (e.g., google, facebook, email).']

  Note: 'Master record for orders placed through the DTC e-commerce channel. Captures order number, placement timestamp, storefront, channel (web, mobile app, PWA), order status, subtotal, discount total, shipping cost, tax amount, grand total, currency, AOV contribution, payment status, fulfillment status, and customer-facing order confirmation details. This entity is the SSOT for DTC digital order capture within the ecommerce domain — it owns the moment of purchase and initial order state. The order domain owns the downstream enterprise-wide order lifecycle (allocation, fulfillment routing, shipment tracking, delivery confirmation) once the order enters the OMS.'
}

Table ecommerce.digital_order_line {
  digital_order_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the digital order line item. Primary key for this entity.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to marketing.campaign. Business justification: Line-level campaign attribution enables product performance analysis by campaign (which SKUs drive campaign revenue). Supports merchandising-marketing collaboration on assortment planning and campaign']
  cogs_entry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cogs_entry. Business justification: Each line item sold requires COGS recognition for gross margin calculation, P&L reporting, and inventory valuation. Core requirement for financial close and profitability analysis by product/channel.']
  collection_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the collection or season this product belongs to. Used for collection performance and STR tracking.']
  digital_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent digital order header. Links this line item to its containing order.']
  ftc_label_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.ftc_label. Business justification: Federal law requires accurate fiber content, care instructions, and origin labeling on apparel sold online. E-commerce systems link order lines to FTC labels to display compliant information on produc']
  fulfillment_distribution_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.distribution_center. Business justification: Order lines may fulfill from different DCs in split shipment scenarios when inventory is distributed across facilities. Essential for line-level fulfillment routing, multi-box shipment coordination, a']
  inspection_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to quality.inspection. Business justification: Order lines require inspection linkage for quality-gated fulfillment decisions (hold shipment if inspection failed), customer service escalations when post-shipment defects are reported, and supplier ']
  merchandise_hierarchy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to merchandising.merchandise_hierarchy. Business justification: Digital order lines require merchandise hierarchy classification for revenue reporting by department/class/subclass, financial consolidation, margin analysis by category, and performance dashboards. S']
  product_safety_test_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.product_safety_test. Business justification: E-commerce order fulfillment requires verification that sold SKUs passed mandatory safety testing. Order management systems check test status before shipment to prevent non-compliant product sales, su']
  promotion_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the promotion applied to this line item. Null if no promotion was applied.']
  quality_certification_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to quality.quality_certification. Business justification: Order lines for certified products (organic, fair trade) require certification references for customs documentation, customer claim verification, and regulatory audit trails. Supports certificate numb']
  retail_store_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the retail store assigned to fulfill this line for store pickup or ship-from-store. Null for warehouse fulfillment.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the shipment containing this line item. Null if not yet shipped. Multiple lines may share one shipment.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific SKU ordered. Represents the unique product variant including style, color, and size.']
  supplier_factory_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supplier.supplier_factory. Business justification: Regulatory compliance (CA Transparency Act, EU due diligence) requires factory-level traceability for products sold online. Critical for product recalls, quality issue root cause analysis, and supply ']
  sustainable_material_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.sustainable_material. Business justification: Enables ESG reporting to attribute revenue/volume to sustainable material usage, powers customer transparency labels on receipts/emails, and supports sustainability impact dashboards. Apparel brands m']
  traceability_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sustainability.traceability_record. Business justification: Connects sold items to supply chain traceability data for post-sale transparency (QR codes on receipts, blockchain verification apps). Real business need: premium brands provide customers with blockch']
  trade_compliance_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.trade_compliance_record. Business justification: International e-commerce orders require HS codes, duty rates, and country-of-origin data for customs documentation and landed cost calculation. Order management systems link order lines to trade compl']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supplier.vendor. Business justification: Apparel e-commerce tracks manufacturing vendor per order line for quality traceability, warranty claims, vendor performance analytics, and chargeback processing. Essential for supply chain accountabil']
  warehouse_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the warehouse or distribution center assigned to fulfill this line. Null if not yet allocated.']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.work_order. Business justification: Made-to-order and pre-order fulfillment requires direct linkage between customer order lines and manufacturing work orders for production scheduling, delivery promise calculation, and order-to-product']
  actual_ship_date date [note: 'Actual date this line item was shipped. Null if not yet shipped. Used for OTIF measurement.']
  backorder_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this line item is on backorder due to insufficient inventory at order time. True if backordered.']
  brand_code varchar [note: 'Reference to the brand of the product on this line. Supports multi-brand DTC operations and brand performance analysis.']
  cogs_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total cost of goods sold for this line item. Quantity ordered multiplied by unit cost. Confidential financial data.']
  colorway varchar [note: 'The color variant of the style ordered. Industry-standard term for color option in apparel.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this line item record was created in the system. Represents when the line was added to the order.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts on this line. Supports multi-currency DTC operations.']
  expected_ship_date date [note: 'Expected date this line item will ship from the fulfillment location. Used for customer communication and SLA tracking.']
  fulfillment_method varchar [note: 'Method by which this line item will be fulfilled. Supports omnichannel fulfillment options.']
  fulfillment_status varchar [note: 'Current fulfillment status of this line item. Tracks the line through warehouse and delivery lifecycle. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: pending|allocated|picked|packed|shipped|delivered|cancelled|returned — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  gift_message varchar [note: 'Customer-provided gift message text for this line item. Confidential customer communication.']
  gift_wrap_charge decimal(15,2) [note: 'Additional charge for gift wrapping service on this line. Zero if gift wrap was not selected or was complimentary.']
  gift_wrap_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether gift wrapping was requested for this line item. True if gift wrap service was selected.']
  line_discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total discount applied to this line item. Sum of all promotional and markdown discounts for the line.']
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential line number within the digital order. Determines the display and processing order of line items.']
  line_subtotal decimal(15,2) [note: 'Subtotal for this line before tax. Calculated as (unit_selling_price * quantity_ordered) - line_discount_amount.']
  line_tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Tax amount applied to this line item. Calculated based on tax jurisdiction and product tax category.']
  line_total decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount for this line including tax. Calculated as line_subtotal + line_tax_amount. Contributes to order total.']
  markdown_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the markdown reason or campaign applied to this line. Used for markdown tracking and analysis.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this line item record was last modified. Tracks updates to quantity, price, or fulfillment status.']
  personalization_charge decimal(15,2) [note: 'Additional charge for personalization service on this line. Zero if personalization was not selected or was complimentary.']
  personalization_text varchar [note: 'Custom text for product personalization (e.g., monogram, embroidery). Confidential customer specification.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Merchandise category of the product on this line. Denormalized for reporting and STR analysis by category.']
  quantity_ordered varchar [note: 'The number of units of this SKU ordered on this line. Used for inventory allocation and revenue calculation.']
  return_eligible_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this line item is eligible for return per business policy. False for final sale or non-returnable items.']
  return_window_days varchar [note: 'Number of days from delivery within which this line can be returned. Null if not return eligible.']
  revenue_recognition_date date [note: 'Date on which revenue for this line item is recognized per accounting policy. Typically ship date or delivery date.']
  size varchar [note: 'The size of the item ordered (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, or numeric sizing). Captured as ordered by customer.']
  style_code varchar [note: 'The style identifier for the product ordered. Represents the base design before color and size variation.']
  tax_category_code varchar [note: 'Product tax category code determining applicable tax rates. Used for tax calculation and compliance reporting.']
  unit_msrp decimal(15,2) [note: 'The manufacturers suggested retail price per unit at the time of order. Used for markdown analysis and pricing strategy.']
  unit_selling_price decimal(15,2) [note: 'The actual selling price per unit charged to the customer. May differ from MSRP due to promotions or markdowns.']

  Note: 'Line-item detail for each SKU within a digital order, including SKU, style, colorway, size, quantity ordered, unit MSRP, unit selling price, line discount, line total, gift wrap flag, personalization text, and fulfillment status per line. Supports STR analysis, markdown tracking, and per-SKU revenue attribution for the DTC channel.'
}

Table ecommerce.digital_payment {
  digital_payment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the digital payment transaction. Primary key for the digital payment entity.']
  sales_order_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the digital sales order associated with this payment transaction.']
  authorization_code varchar [note: 'Authorization code returned by the payment gateway or issuing bank confirming approval of the transaction.']
  authorization_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the payment was authorized by the payment gateway or issuing bank.']
  avs_result_code varchar [note: 'Address Verification System result code returned by the payment processor indicating the match status of billing address components.']
  billing_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the billing address associated with the payment method, used for address verification and fraud screening.']
  billing_city varchar [note: 'City component of the billing address associated with the payment method.']
  billing_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the billing address country.']
  billing_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the billing address used for address verification and fraud detection.']
  billing_state_province varchar [note: 'State or province component of the billing address associated with the payment method.']
  capture_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the authorized payment was captured and funds were committed for settlement.']
  card_brand varchar [note: 'The payment card network or brand for card-based transactions, such as Visa, Mastercard, or American Express. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: visa|mastercard|amex|discover|jcb|diners|unionpay|maestro|not_applicable — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  card_expiry_month varchar [note: 'Expiration month of the payment card used in the transaction, stored for validation and retry logic.']
  card_expiry_year varchar [note: 'Expiration year of the payment card used in the transaction, stored for validation and retry logic.']
  card_last_four_digits varchar [note: 'Last four digits of the payment card number used for customer reference and reconciliation purposes without exposing full card details.']
  cardholder_name varchar [note: 'Name of the cardholder as it appears on the payment card, used for verification and reconciliation purposes.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this payment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code representing the currency in which the payment was processed.']
  customer_ip_address varchar [note: 'Internet Protocol address of the customer device at the time of payment submission, used for fraud detection and geographic analysis.']
  cvv_result_code varchar [note: 'Card Verification Value result code indicating whether the CVV provided matched the card issuer records.']
  decline_reason_code varchar [note: 'Code provided by the payment gateway or issuing bank indicating the reason for payment decline or failure.']
  decline_reason_description varchar [note: 'Human-readable description of the reason why the payment was declined or failed, used for customer communication and root-cause analysis.']
  device_fingerprint varchar [note: 'Unique identifier or hash representing the customer\'s device characteristics, used for fraud detection and device recognition.']
  fraud_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk score assigned by the fraud detection system indicating the likelihood of fraudulent activity, typically ranging from 0 to 100.']
