  swatch_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the fabric swatch, typically including fabric type, texture, or visual characteristics for easy identification by designers.']
  swatch_receipt_date date [note: 'Date when the physical or digital fabric swatch was received by the design team for evaluation.']
  swatch_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the fabric swatch record. Active indicates available for use, archived indicates historical reference, discontinued indicates supplier no longer offers, expired indicates evaluation period ended.']
  texture_description varchar [note: 'Qualitative description of the fabric texture and hand feel, such as smooth, brushed, ribbed, slub, or textured. Captures tactile characteristics important for design evaluation.']
  trend_alignment_tags varchar [note: 'Keywords or tags linking the fabric swatch to current fashion trends, consumer preferences, or market themes identified in trend research. Comma-separated list.']

  Note: 'Master record for a physical or digital fabric swatch evaluated during the design phase for potential use in a collection. Captures swatch name, fabric type (woven, knit, denim, jersey, technical), fiber composition, weight (GSM), finish, texture, color, supplier mill, swatch receipt date, designer evaluation notes, adoption decision (selected, shortlisted, rejected), and associated season or concept. Fabric swatches are the material exploration artifacts that precede formal material sourcing.'
}

Table design.asset {
  asset_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the design asset record. Primary key for the design asset entity.']
  asset_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user or approver who granted final approval for this design asset, used for audit trail and accountability.']
  asset_uploaded_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who uploaded or created the design asset record in the DAM system, used for audit trail and accountability.']
  collection_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the seasonal collection or product line that this design asset belongs to, enabling collection-level asset management.']
  concept_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the design concept that this asset supports or illustrates, linking assets to the creative ideation phase.']
  designer_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the designer or creative professional who owns or is responsible for this design asset, used for attribution and workflow routing.']
  original_asset_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on asset (original_asset_id)']
  style_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the product style or Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) that this design asset is associated with, linking creative assets to product records.']
  superseded_by_asset_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the newer design asset that supersedes or replaces this asset, used for version lineage and historical tracking.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Approval workflow status indicating whether the design asset has been reviewed and approved for use in production or marketing materials.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the design asset was approved, recorded for compliance and workflow tracking.']
  archived_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the design asset was archived or moved to inactive status, used for lifecycle management and retention policy enforcement.']
  asset_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier or reference code assigned to the design asset for cataloging and cross-referencing across systems.']
  asset_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the design asset content, purpose, and creative intent, used for search, cataloging, and context.']
  asset_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title of the design asset, used for identification and search within the Digital Asset Management (DAM) system.']
  asset_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the design asset within the DAM system (active, archived, restricted, pending approval, rejected, expired), controlling visibility and usage.']
  asset_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the design asset by its creative purpose and format within the design workflow (e.g., sketch, CAD export, print file, lookbook image, runway photo, reference imagery).']
  checksum_hash varchar [note: 'Cryptographic hash or checksum of the asset file, used for integrity verification, duplicate detection, and change tracking.']
  color_palette_hex_codes varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of hexadecimal color codes representing the primary color palette featured in the design asset, used for color trend analysis and coordination.']
  copyright_attribution varchar [note: 'Copyright holder or attribution statement for the design asset, required for compliance with intellectual property laws and licensing agreements.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the usage rights or license for this design asset expires, after which the asset may no longer be legally used without renewal.']
  fabric_reference_code varchar [note: 'Reference code linking the design asset to a specific fabric or material in the material library, used for sourcing and Bill of Materials (BOM) planning.']
  file_format varchar [note: 'Technical file format or extension of the digital asset (e.g., JPG, PNG, TIFF, PSD, AI, PDF, SVG, DXF, OBJ, FBX, MP4). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: jpg|png|tiff|psd|ai|pdf|svg|dxf|obj|fbx|mp4 — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  file_size_bytes varchar [note: 'Size of the digital asset file measured in bytes, used for storage management and transfer optimization.']
  gender_target varchar [note: 'Target gender segment for the design asset (mens, womens, unisex, kids, infant), used for collection segmentation and merchandising.']
  inspiration_source varchar [note: 'Description of the creative inspiration or reference source for the design asset (e.g., cultural movement, art period, geographic region, designer brand).']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the design asset contains confidential or proprietary information requiring restricted access and handling.']
  is_featured boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether the design asset is featured or highlighted for promotional, presentation, or portfolio purposes.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the design asset metadata or file was last modified, used for change tracking and synchronization.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form notes or comments about the design asset, used for collaboration, feedback, and contextual information sharing among design team members.']
  price_tier varchar [note: 'Target price tier or market positioning for products associated with this design asset (luxury, premium, mid-tier, value, entry), used for brand alignment and merchandising strategy.']
  product_category varchar [note: 'Product category or garment type that the design asset is intended for (e.g., tops, bottoms, outerwear, footwear, accessories), used for asset organization and filtering.']
  season_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the fashion season (e.g., SS24, FW24, Holiday 2024) for which this design asset was created, used for temporal organization and archiving.']
  storage_location_type varchar [note: 'Type of storage infrastructure hosting the asset (cloud, on-premise, hybrid, archive), used for access and retrieval planning.']
  storage_path varchar [note: 'Full file system or cloud storage path where the digital asset is stored, enabling retrieval and access control.']
  tags varchar [note: 'Comma-separated or pipe-separated list of keywords and tags applied to the design asset for search, filtering, and categorization within the DAM system.']
  thumbnail_url varchar [note: 'Web-accessible URL of the asset thumbnail image for preview and quick reference in DAM interfaces and design review tools.']
  trend_theme varchar [note: 'Trend theme or macro trend that the design asset aligns with or illustrates, used for trend tracking and collection planning.']
  upload_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the design asset was first uploaded or ingested into the DAM system, used for audit trail and asset lifecycle tracking.']
  usage_rights varchar [note: 'Legal usage rights and permissions associated with the design asset, defining how and where the asset may be used (internal only, licensed, royalty-free, restricted, public domain).']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version number of the design asset, used to track iterations and revisions throughout the design development process.']

  Note: 'Master record for any digital creative asset managed within the design domain\'s digital asset library — including final approved sketches, CAD exports, print files, lookbook images, runway photos, and reference imagery. Captures asset name, asset type, file format, file size, storage path, associated style or concept, season, designer owner, usage rights, expiry date, and asset status (active, archived, restricted). Serves as the design domain\'s DAM (Digital Asset Management) catalog.'
}

Table design.designer {
  designer_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the designer record. Primary key for the designer entity in the design domain.']
  designer_created_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who created the designer record.']
  designer_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the design director or manager to whom this designer reports.']
  designer_last_modified_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who last modified the designer record.']
  reports_to_designer_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on designer (reports_to_designer_id)']
  assigned_categories varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of product categories the designer is currently assigned to work on, such as tops, bottoms, outerwear, footwear, or accessories.']
  awards_recognition varchar [note: 'Summary of industry awards, recognitions, or notable achievements earned by the designer throughout their career.']
  certifications varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of professional certifications or accreditations held by the designer, such as OEKO-TEX certification, GOTS training, or technical design credentials.']
  collaboration_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes capturing collaboration preferences, working style, or special considerations for team assignments and project planning.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Financial cost center code to which the designers compensation and expenses are allocated.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the designer record was first created in the system.']
  design_team_assignment varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the design team or studio the designer is assigned to, such as Womens Apparel Team, Footwear Innovation Lab, or Print Studio.']
  designer_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier code assigned to the designer for internal reference and system integration. Format: three uppercase letters followed by four digits.']
  designer_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the designer record indicating their availability and engagement state.']
  designer_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the designer based on their primary creative discipline within the design function.']
  education_background varchar [note: 'Summary of the designers educational qualifications, including degrees, institutions, and relevant certifications in design or related fields.']
  email_address varchar [note: 'Primary email address for designer communication and collaboration.']
  employment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the designers employment relationship with the organization. Full Time Employee (FTE), freelance, contractor, intern, or consultant.']
  full_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the designer or creative contributor.']
  hire_date date [note: 'Date the designer was hired or onboarded into the organization.']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the designers identity and work are subject to confidentiality restrictions, such as for high-profile collaborations or stealth projects.']
  language_skills varchar [note: 'Languages the designer is fluent in, supporting global collaboration and market-specific design work.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the designer record was last updated or modified.']
  last_performance_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent formal performance review conducted for the designer.']
  location_office varchar [note: 'Primary office or studio location where the designer is based, such as New York HQ, Milan Design Center, or Remote.']
  performance_rating varchar [note: 'Most recent performance evaluation rating for the designer, reflecting their contribution and quality of work.']
  phone_number varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the designer.']
  portfolio_reference_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path reference to the designers portfolio showcasing their creative work and design projects.']
  preferred_name varchar [note: 'Preferred or professional name used by the designer in creative work and collaboration.']
  seniority_level varchar [note: 'Hierarchical level of the designer within the design organization, reflecting experience and responsibility.']
  software_proficiency varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of design software and tools the designer is proficient in, such as Adobe Illustrator, CLO 3D, Centric PLM, or Browzwear.']
  specialization varchar [note: 'Specific area of expertise or focus within the designers discipline, such as menswear, womenswear, activewear, luxury, or sustainable design.']
  sustainability_focus_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the designer has specialized expertise or focus on sustainable design practices and eco-friendly materials.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Date the designers employment or engagement with the organization ended. Null if currently active.']
  years_of_experience varchar [note: 'Total number of years of professional design experience the designer has in the apparel and fashion industry.']

  Note: 'Design-domain master record for individual designers and creative contributors working within the design function — including in-house designers, freelance designers, pattern makers, and technical designers. Captures designer name, designer type (apparel designer, footwear designer, accessories designer, print designer, technical designer, pattern maker), specialization, seniority level, assigned categories, portfolio reference, employment type (FTE, freelance, contractor), active status, and design team assignment. Distinct from workforce.employee — this is the design-domain view of creative talent with design-specific attributes.'
}

Table design.inspiration {
  inspiration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the design inspiration record. Primary key.']
  concept_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the design concept to which this inspiration has been linked or applied, if applicable.']
  derived_from_inspiration_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on inspiration (derived_from_inspiration_id)']
  logged_by_designer_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the designer or design team member who logged this inspiration into the system.']
  trend_item_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the trend item record to which this inspiration is related, enabling linkage to formal trend analysis.']
  additional_media_urls varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of additional image, video, or media URLs that provide further visual context for this inspiration.']
  adoption_status varchar [note: 'Current status of this inspiration in the design workflow: logged (newly captured), under review (being evaluated), adopted (incorporated into design), archived (stored for future reference), or rejected (not pursued).']
  color_palette varchar [note: 'Dominant colors or color combinations observed in the inspiration, described in business terms or hex codes.']
  construction_details varchar [note: 'Key construction techniques or details observed, such as draping, pleating, tailoring, embroidery, appliqué, or innovative seaming.']
  copyright_attribution varchar [note: 'Copyright or attribution information for the inspiration source, ensuring proper credit and legal compliance when using external references.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspiration record was first created in the system.']
  cultural_influence varchar [note: 'Cultural movements, historical periods, or societal themes reflected in the inspiration, such as 1970s revival, minimalism, maximalism, or streetwear culture.']
  design_notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes or commentary from the design team regarding how this inspiration might be translated into product design or collection development.']
  designer_brand varchar [note: 'Name of the designer or brand associated with the inspiration source, particularly relevant for runway and competitive observations.']
  fabric_elements varchar [note: 'Notable fabric types, textures, or material characteristics observed, such as silk, denim, leather, knit, woven, technical fabrics, or sustainable materials.']
  gender_target varchar [note: 'Target gender segment for which this inspiration is most relevant.']
  geographic_origin varchar [note: 'Geographic location or region where the inspiration was observed or originated (e.g., Paris, Tokyo, New York, Milan).']
  image_reference_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the primary image or visual reference associated with this inspiration.']
  inspiration_code varchar [note: 'Unique business code or reference number assigned to this inspiration entry for cataloging and retrieval.']
  inspiration_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the inspiration, capturing the designers observations, creative insights, and potential application ideas.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this inspiration record is currently active and available for use in the design teams knowledge base.']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether this inspiration is confidential and should be restricted to authorized design team members only.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this inspiration record was last updated or modified.']
  observation_date date [note: 'Date when the inspiration was observed, captured, or logged by the design team.']
  price_tier_relevance varchar [note: 'Price tier or market segment to which this inspiration is most applicable.']
  print_pattern_theme varchar [note: 'Print or pattern themes observed in the inspiration, such as floral, geometric, abstract, animal print, stripes, or cultural motifs.']
  product_category_relevance varchar [note: 'Product categories to which this inspiration is most applicable, such as outerwear, dresses, activewear, footwear, or accessories.']
  relevance_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric score (0-100) indicating the assessed relevance or importance of this inspiration to current or future collections, assigned by design leadership.']
  season_relevance varchar [note: 'Season or seasonal period to which this inspiration is most relevant (e.g., Spring/Summer 2025, Fall/Winter 2024).']
  season_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year associated with the season relevance for time-series analysis and trend tracking.']
  silhouette_elements varchar [note: 'Key silhouette characteristics observed in the inspiration, such as oversized, fitted, A-line, boxy, flowing, structured, asymmetric, or layered.']
  source_name varchar [note: 'Name of the specific source, such as the runway show name, exhibition title, competitive brand name, location visited, or publication name.']
  source_type varchar [note: 'Category of the inspiration source: runway show, street style observation, art exhibition, nature, cultural event, competitive brand observation, travel reference, editorial content, or social media. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: runway|street_style|art|nature|culture|competitive|exhibition|travel|editorial|social_media — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  styling_elements varchar [note: 'Notable styling details or accessory elements observed, such as layering techniques, belt usage, footwear style, or jewelry trends.']
  sustainability_indicator boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the inspiration includes sustainable design elements, eco-friendly materials, or circular fashion principles.']
  tags varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords or tags for search, filtering, and categorization of inspiration records within the design teams knowledge base.']
  title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title or name given to this inspiration reference by the design team.']
  trend_alignment varchar [note: 'Key trend themes or macro trends that this inspiration aligns with, linking to broader trend forecasting and market direction.']
  usage_count varchar [note: 'Number of times this inspiration has been referenced or applied in design concepts, mood boards, or product development activities.']
  usage_rights varchar [note: 'Usage rights classification indicating how this inspiration may be used: internal only, licensed for commercial use, public domain, or restricted.']

  Note: 'Master record for a curated inspiration reference logged by the design team — including runway show references, street style observations, cultural events, art exhibitions, travel references, and competitive brand observations. Captures inspiration title, source type (runway, street style, art, nature, culture, competitive), source name, season relevance, geographic origin, key design elements observed (silhouette, color, fabric, construction), designer who logged it, and associated concept or trend item. Builds the design team\'s institutional creative knowledge base.'
}

Table shared.organization {
  organization_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for organization']
  address_line_1 varchar [note: 'The first line of the organization\'s primary physical address, typically including street number and name.']
  address_line_2 varchar [note: 'The second line of the organization\'s primary physical address, typically including suite, floor, or building information.']
  annual_revenue_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total annual revenue generated by the organization in the base currency.']
  city varchar [note: 'The city or municipality where the organization is located.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the organization is located.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this organization record was first created in the system.']
  credit_rating varchar [note: 'The credit rating assigned to the organization by a recognized credit rating agency.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'The ISO 4217 three-letter currency code used for financial reporting by the organization.']
  dissolution_date date [note: 'The date on which the organization was legally dissolved or ceased operations, if applicable.']
  doing_business_as_name varchar [note: 'The trade name or brand name under which the organization operates, if different from the legal name.']
  duns_number varchar [note: 'The nine-digit DUNS number assigned by Dun & Bradstreet to uniquely identify the organization.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date from which this organization record becomes effective in the system.']
  employee_count varchar [note: 'The total number of employees working for the organization.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'The date on which this organization record expires or is no longer valid, if applicable.']
  fiscal_year_end_month varchar [note: 'The month (1-12) in which the organization\'s fiscal year ends.']
  incorporation_date date [note: 'The date on which the organization was legally incorporated or established.']
  industry_classification_code varchar [note: 'The standard industry classification code (e.g., NAICS, SIC) that categorizes the organization\'s primary business activity.']
  is_publicly_traded boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the organization is publicly traded on a stock exchange.']
  is_tax_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the organization has tax-exempt status.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this organization record was last updated or modified.']
  legal_entity_identifier varchar [note: 'The ISO 17442 Legal Entity Identifier for the organization, a 20-character alphanumeric code.']
  name varchar [note: 'The legal or registered name of the organization.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-form notes or comments about the organization.']
  organization_type varchar [note: 'The classification of the organization based on its structural role within the enterprise.']
  parent_organization_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent organization if this organization is a subsidiary or branch.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'The postal or ZIP code for the organization\'s primary address.']
  primary_business_description varchar [note: 'A textual description of the organization\'s primary business activities and operations.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'The primary email address for contacting the organization.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'The primary phone number for contacting the organization.']
  registration_authority varchar [note: 'The name of the government or regulatory body that issued the registration number.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'The official registration or company number assigned by the government or regulatory authority.']
  state_province varchar [note: 'The state, province, or region where the organization is located.']
  status varchar [note: 'The current operational status of the organization within the enterprise.']
  stock_exchange_symbol varchar [note: 'The ticker symbol under which the organization\'s stock is traded on a public exchange, if applicable.']
  tax_identification_number varchar [note: 'The tax identification number assigned by the relevant tax authority for the organization.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'The IANA time zone identifier for the organization\'s primary location.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'The official website URL of the organization.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for organization. Referenced by organization_id.'
}
